basic_details.job_title: District Court Tura Technical Staff Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: District Court Tura Technical Staff Notification 2026 has been released on 15 May 2026 on the official website www.tura.dcourts.gov.in. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the District Court Tura Technical Staff Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 32 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST

qualification.education_qualification: BCA, B.Tech (Computer Science), BSC IT, MCA
qualification.details: BCA or B.Tech (Computer Science) or BSC IT or MCA, from a registered institute.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for District Court Tura Technical Staff Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.tura.dcourts.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 05-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the District Court Tura Technical Staff recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of applications is 05-06-2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Technical Staff post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a BCA, B.Tech (Computer Science), BSC IT, or MCA degree from a registered institute to be eligible for this position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Technical Staff position?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Technical Staff post is between 18 years and 32 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST candidates.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Technical Staff role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 25,000/- per month for the contractual period.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Technical Staff post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Technical Staff for live streaming of Court Proceedings position in District Court Tura.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form and submit it via post.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Technical Staff role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve scrutiny and screening of applications, followed by an interview of the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of the District Court Tura, which is www.tura.dcourts.gov.in.

faq.question: Q10. What is the date of the interview?
faq.answer: The interview for the shortlisted candidates is scheduled to be held on 11-06-2026.
